claim: Google's Project Starlight aims to build massive data centers in space with solar panels 8x more productive than on Earth and satellite inter-links
actionable: Monitor space-based AI infrastructure development; plan for future availability of near-infinite compute powered by solar in orbit.

claim: Satellites in data center clusters must be positioned only a few hundred meters apart and maintain compact formations to maximize solar energy capture
actionable: Understand the physics constraints of orbital data centers; tight spacing enables communication but requires precise positioning and radiation hardening.
